text: Reverse-engineer how you think, talk, and make decisions — then turn it into a stress-tested AI System Prompt. Works on any LLM. Full pipeline with Claude Code.

title: TLDR
text: Verdict-first output for AI coding agents. Tiny prompt + installer for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, opencode, and 30+ agents.

title: promptdown
text: A Python package that enables the creation and parsing of structured prompts for language models in markdown format

title: fable-mode
text: Run Claude Fable 5 on Opus 4.8 in Claude Code. The Mythos-class model pulled by export controls — brought back as a native agentic distillation (FABLE_CODE.md), measured playbook, verification hooks, and design/MCP/test skills. "Fable 5 Lite," done right.

title: SANCTIS-cognitive-architecture
text: SANCTIS is a cognitive architecture that gives LLMs structured tools to organize their own reasoning, maintain long-horizon coherence, and reduce drift. It installs stable thinking patterns that emerge more powerfully the longer the model runs.

title: upg
text: Universal Prompt Generator — prompt-engineering system for text-to-image models. Spectrum of 1–5 calibrated prompts per theme, with safety/drift/cliche enforcement built into the pipeline.

title: re-protocol
text: re!think it. System prompt teaching LLMs to execute two core tasks: complex answers without hallucinations, and creative ideas without clichés. Written in math-like logic, which LLMs parse better than plain language. Built for mid-to-high complexity tasks, featuring a Bypass branch to execute simple prompts directly without added cognitive overhead

title: claude-code-prompt-engineering-patterns
text: 10 production prompt engineering patterns reverse-engineered from the Claude Code source leak. Python implementation. No proprietary code.

title: anti-slop-writing
text: Improve AI text to sound natural, clear, and human-like by reducing stiffness and enhancing specificity for multiple AI writing tools.

title: hersona
text: 346 reusable character attributes for AI agent personas — compose, measure, and port system-prompt personas. Build once. Keep personality everywhere.

title: seven-layer-prompt
text: A 7-layer scaffold for production AI agent system prompts. Security-first, multi-tenant by design.

title: claude-system-prompt
text: Reverse-engineered system prompts from Claude (claude.ai) and Claude Code CLI, validated against Anthropic's officially published prompts.
